category.title: Search
category.summary: Search engines and site-specific search workflows

entries.title: Baidu Search
entries.summary: Use Baidu for Chinese-language queries and China-local results. If pressing Enter does not submit, click the visible search button.

entries.title: Google Search
entries.summary: Use Google as the default engine for general English or international queries. Prefer it when advanced operators are useful.

entries.title: Bing Search
entries.summary: Use Bing for image or video search and Microsoft-oriented tasks. Choose it when Google is not the preferred engine.
